name: Experience Awards
description: Experience comes from treasure won and monsters defeated, prorated by depth: a character operating above his level gains own-level/dungeon-level (an 8th-level Magic-User on the 5th level earns 5/8). Never award above 1-for-1, and never more in one adventure than lifts the character a single level (award 3,999 rather than two levels' worth). Prime-requisite bonuses and penalties apply.
special_notes: worked example arithmetic corrected per ir-a4 (6,737.5)
